design_notes: S0 and S1 introduce the casual player with basic alternating taps and an early, comfortable GAP-lane hold to establish the rhythm. S2 establishes a highly satisfying and consistent flow utilizing 4-beat spacing to prevent visual clutter while ensuring no massive sparse gaps exist, highlighted by a strong physical downbeat resolution on beat 12. S3 and S4 maintain the drive of the second drop with a prominent downbeat tap at beat 44, using alternating outer lane movements to keep up the momentum before ending on a final, natural resolution.

sections.name: Intro
sections.intent: Gentle rhythm introduction with a simple sustain.

sections.name: First Drop
sections.intent: Driving, comfortable lane-alternating patterns with clear downbeat resolutions.

sections.name: Second Drop
sections.intent: Strong drop transition entry followed by smooth, continuous movement into the outro.
